put.description: Create Cognitive Services Account. Accounts is a resource group wide resource type. It holds the keys for developer to access intelligent APIs. It's also the resource type for billing.

parameters.name: resourceGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

parameters.name: accountName
parameters.description: The name of Cognitive Services account.

parameters.name: account

schema.description: Cognitive Services account is an Azure resource representing the provisioned account, it's type, location and SKU.

kind.description: The Kind of the resource.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

type.description: The identity type.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}

principalId.description: Azure Active Directory principal ID associated with this Identity.

clientId.description: Client App Id associated with this identity.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the cognitive services account at the time the operation was called.

internalId.description: The internal identifier (deprecated, do not use this property).

value.description: The value of the SkuCapability.

items.description: SkuCapability indicates the capability of a certain feature.

capabilities.description: Gets the capabilities of the cognitive services account. Each item indicates the capability of a specific feature. The values are read-only and for reference only.

isMigrated.description: If the resource is migrated from an existing key.

countOfUpgradesAfterDowngrades.description: Gets the count of upgrades after downgrades.

customSubDomainName.description: Optional subdomain name used for token-based authentication.

networkAcls.description: A collection of rules governing the accessibility from specific network locations.

defaultAction.description: The default action when no rule from ipRules and from virtualNetworkRules match. This is only used after the bypass property has been evaluated.

value.description: An IPv4 address range in CIDR notation, such as '124.56.78.91' (simple IP address) or '124.56.78.0/24' (all addresses that start with 124.56.78).

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific ip address or ip range.

ipRules.description: The list of IP address rules.

id.description: Full resource id of a vnet subnet, such as '/subscriptions/subid/resourceGroups/rg1/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/test-vnet/subnets/subnet1'.

state.description: Gets the state of virtual network rule.

ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint.description: Ignore missing vnet service endpoint or not.

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific virtual network.

virtualNetworkRules.description: The list of virtual network rules.

encryption.description: The encryption properties for this resource.

keyName.description: Name of the Key from KeyVault

keyVersion.description: Version of the Key from KeyVault

keySource.description: Enumerates the possible value of keySource for Encryption

resourceId.description: Full resource id of a Microsoft.Storage resource.

items.description: The user owned storage for Cognitive Services account.

userOwnedStorage.description: The storage accounts for this resource.

amlWorkspace.description: The user owned AML account properties.

resourceId.description: Full resource id of a AML account resource.

identityClientId.description: Identity Client id of a AML account resource.

privateEndpoint.description: The resource of private end point.

id.description: The ARM identifier for Private Endpoint

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

status.description: Indicates whether the connection has been Approved/Rejected/Removed by the owner of the service.

description.description: The reason for approval/rejection of the connection.

actionsRequired.description: A message indicating if changes on the service provider require any updates on the consumer.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the private endpoint connection resource.

groupIds.description: The private link resource group ids.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

location.description: The location of the private endpoint connection

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

items.description: The Private Endpoint Connection resource.

privateEndpointConnections.description: The private endpoint connection associated with the Cognitive Services account.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Whether or not public endpoint access is allowed for this account.

apiProperties.description: The api properties for special APIs.

qnaRuntimeEndpoint.description: (QnAMaker Only) The runtime endpoint of QnAMaker.

qnaAzureSearchEndpointKey.description: (QnAMaker Only) The Azure Search endpoint key of QnAMaker.

qnaAzureSearchEndpointId.description: (QnAMaker Only) The Azure Search endpoint id of QnAMaker.

statisticsEnabled.description: (Bing Search Only) The flag to enable statistics of Bing Search.

eventHubConnectionString.description: (Personalization Only) The flag to enable statistics of Bing Search.

storageAccountConnectionString.description: (Personalization Only) The storage account connection string.

aadClientId.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The Azure AD Client Id (Application Id).

aadTenantId.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The Azure AD Tenant Id.

superUser.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The super user of Metrics Advisor.

websiteName.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The website name of Metrics Advisor.

dateCreated.description: Gets the date of cognitive services account creation.

count.description: The count value of Call Rate Limit.

renewalPeriod.description: The renewal period in seconds of Call Rate Limit.

callRateLimit.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

dynamicThrottlingEnabled.description: The flag to enable dynamic throttling.

storedCompletionsDisabled.description: The flag to disable stored completions.

deletionDate.description: The deletion date, only available for deleted account.

scheduledPurgeDate.description: The scheduled purge date, only available for deleted account.

locations.description: The multiregion settings of Cognitive Services account.

value.description: A value for priority or weighted routing methods.

customsubdomain.description: Maps the region to the regional custom subdomain.

items.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

commitmentPlanId.description: The Azure resource id of the commitment plan.

commitmentPlanLocation.description: The location of of the commitment plan.

items.description: The commitment plan association.

commitmentPlanAssociations.description: The commitment plan associations of Cognitive Services account.

expiration.description: The datetime of expiration of the AbusePenalty.

identityClientId.description: The identity client Id to access the storage.

items.description: Specifies in AI Foundry where virtual network injection occurs to secure scenarios like Agents entirely within the user's private network, eliminating public internet exposure while maintaining control over network configurations and resources.

scenario.description: Specifies what features in AI Foundry network injection applies to. Currently only supports 'agent' for agent scenarios. 'none' means no network injection.

subnetArmId.description: Specify the subnet for which your Agent Client is injected into.

useMicrosoftManagedNetwork.description: Boolean to enable Microsoft Managed Network for subnet delegation

allowProjectManagement.description: Specifies whether this resource support project management as child resources, used as containers for access management, data isolation and cost in AI Foundry.

defaultProject.description: Specifies the project, by project name, that is targeted when data plane endpoints are called without a project parameter.

associatedProjects.description: Specifies the projects, by project name, that are associated with this resource.

schema.description: Cognitive Services account is an Azure resource representing the provisioned account, it's type, location and SKU.

kind.description: The Kind of the resource.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

type.description: The identity type.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}

principalId.description: Azure Active Directory principal ID associated with this Identity.

clientId.description: Client App Id associated with this identity.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the cognitive services account at the time the operation was called.

internalId.description: The internal identifier (deprecated, do not use this property).

value.description: The value of the SkuCapability.

items.description: SkuCapability indicates the capability of a certain feature.

capabilities.description: Gets the capabilities of the cognitive services account. Each item indicates the capability of a specific feature. The values are read-only and for reference only.

isMigrated.description: If the resource is migrated from an existing key.

countOfUpgradesAfterDowngrades.description: Gets the count of upgrades after downgrades.

customSubDomainName.description: Optional subdomain name used for token-based authentication.

networkAcls.description: A collection of rules governing the accessibility from specific network locations.

defaultAction.description: The default action when no rule from ipRules and from virtualNetworkRules match. This is only used after the bypass property has been evaluated.

value.description: An IPv4 address range in CIDR notation, such as '124.56.78.91' (simple IP address) or '124.56.78.0/24' (all addresses that start with 124.56.78).

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific ip address or ip range.

ipRules.description: The list of IP address rules.

id.description: Full resource id of a vnet subnet, such as '/subscriptions/subid/resourceGroups/rg1/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/test-vnet/subnets/subnet1'.

state.description: Gets the state of virtual network rule.

ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint.description: Ignore missing vnet service endpoint or not.

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific virtual network.

virtualNetworkRules.description: The list of virtual network rules.

encryption.description: The encryption properties for this resource.

keyName.description: Name of the Key from KeyVault

keyVersion.description: Version of the Key from KeyVault

keySource.description: Enumerates the possible value of keySource for Encryption

resourceId.description: Full resource id of a Microsoft.Storage resource.

items.description: The user owned storage for Cognitive Services account.

userOwnedStorage.description: The storage accounts for this resource.

amlWorkspace.description: The user owned AML account properties.

resourceId.description: Full resource id of a AML account resource.

identityClientId.description: Identity Client id of a AML account resource.

privateEndpoint.description: The resource of private end point.

id.description: The ARM identifier for Private Endpoint

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

status.description: Indicates whether the connection has been Approved/Rejected/Removed by the owner of the service.

description.description: The reason for approval/rejection of the connection.

actionsRequired.description: A message indicating if changes on the service provider require any updates on the consumer.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the private endpoint connection resource.

groupIds.description: The private link resource group ids.

items.description: The Private Endpoint Connection resource.

privateEndpointConnections.description: The private endpoint connection associated with the Cognitive Services account.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Whether or not public endpoint access is allowed for this account.

apiProperties.description: The api properties for special APIs.

qnaRuntimeEndpoint.description: (QnAMaker Only) The runtime endpoint of QnAMaker.

qnaAzureSearchEndpointKey.description: (QnAMaker Only) The Azure Search endpoint key of QnAMaker.

qnaAzureSearchEndpointId.description: (QnAMaker Only) The Azure Search endpoint id of QnAMaker.

statisticsEnabled.description: (Bing Search Only) The flag to enable statistics of Bing Search.

eventHubConnectionString.description: (Personalization Only) The flag to enable statistics of Bing Search.

storageAccountConnectionString.description: (Personalization Only) The storage account connection string.

aadClientId.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The Azure AD Client Id (Application Id).

aadTenantId.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The Azure AD Tenant Id.

superUser.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The super user of Metrics Advisor.

websiteName.description: (Metrics Advisor Only) The website name of Metrics Advisor.

dateCreated.description: Gets the date of cognitive services account creation.

count.description: The count value of Call Rate Limit.

renewalPeriod.description: The renewal period in seconds of Call Rate Limit.

callRateLimit.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

dynamicThrottlingEnabled.description: The flag to enable dynamic throttling.

storedCompletionsDisabled.description: The flag to disable stored completions.

deletionDate.description: The deletion date, only available for deleted account.

scheduledPurgeDate.description: The scheduled purge date, only available for deleted account.

locations.description: The multiregion settings of Cognitive Services account.

value.description: A value for priority or weighted routing methods.

customsubdomain.description: Maps the region to the regional custom subdomain.

items.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

commitmentPlanId.description: The Azure resource id of the commitment plan.

commitmentPlanLocation.description: The location of of the commitment plan.

items.description: The commitment plan association.

commitmentPlanAssociations.description: The commitment plan associations of Cognitive Services account.

expiration.description: The datetime of expiration of the AbusePenalty.

identityClientId.description: The identity client Id to access the storage.

items.description: Specifies in AI Foundry where virtual network injection occurs to secure scenarios like Agents entirely within the user's private network, eliminating public internet exposure while maintaining control over network configurations and resources.

scenario.description: Specifies what features in AI Foundry network injection applies to. Currently only supports 'agent' for agent scenarios. 'none' means no network injection.

subnetArmId.description: Specify the subnet for which your Agent Client is injected into.

useMicrosoftManagedNetwork.description: Boolean to enable Microsoft Managed Network for subnet delegation

allowProjectManagement.description: Specifies whether this resource support project management as child resources, used as containers for access management, data isolation and cost in AI Foundry.

defaultProject.description: Specifies the project, by project name, that is targeted when data plane endpoints are called without a project parameter.

associatedProjects.description: Specifies the projects, by project name, that are associated with this resource.

For a detailed explanation of each field in the response body, please refer to the request body description in the PUT resource section. The only GET specific properties are "name," "type" and "id."
Field	Description
Kind	required.  String.
	The API set for this API account. It can be 
	· a single API, for example: Face API, Vision API, Speech API. 
	a bundle of APIs:  Face + Speech, Vision + Emotion, etc.
sku.name	Required.
	The pricing tier/plan of this API. Could be: 
	F0 - Free
	B0 - Basic
	S0 - Standard
	P0 - Premium

get.description: Returns a Cognitive Services account specified by the parameters.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Resource location.

parameters.name: resourceGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

parameters.name: accountName
parameters.description: The name of Cognitive Services account.

parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription.

200.description:
The resource provider should return 200 (OK) to indicate that the operation completed successfully.
For a detailed explanation of each field in the response body, please refer to the request body description in the PUT resource section. The only GET specific properties are "name," "type" and "id."
Field	Description
Kind	required.  String.
	The API set for this API account. It can be 
	· a single API, for example: Face API, Vision API, Speech API. 
	a bundle of APIs:  Face + Speech, Vision + Emotion, etc.
sku.name	Required.
	The pricing tier/plan of this API. Could be: 
	F0 - Free
	B0 - Basic
	S0 - Standard
	P0 - Premium

schema.description: Cognitive Services account is an Azure resource representing the provisioned account, it's type, location and SKU.

kind.description: The Kind of the resource.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

type.description: The identity type.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}

principalId.description: Azure Active Directory principal ID associated with this Identity.

clientId.description: Client App Id associated with this identity.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the cognitive services account at the time the operation was called.

internalId.description: The internal identifier (deprecated, do not use this property).

value.description: The value of the SkuCapability.

items.description: SkuCapability indicates the capability of a certain feature.

capabilities.description: Gets the capabilities of the cognitive services account. Each item indicates the capability of a specific feature. The values are read-only and for reference only.

isMigrated.description: If the resource is migrated from an existing key.

countOfUpgradesAfterDowngrades.description: Gets the count of upgrades after downgrades.

customSubDomainName.description: Optional subdomain name used for token-based authentication.

networkAcls.description: A collection of rules governing the accessibility from specific network locations.

defaultAction.description: The default action when no rule from ipRules and from virtualNetworkRules match. This is only used after the bypass property has been evaluated.

value.description: An IPv4 address range in CIDR notation, such as '124.56.78.91' (simple IP address) or '124.56.78.0/24' (all addresses that start with 124.56.78).

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific ip address or ip range.

ipRules.description: The list of IP address rules.

id.description: Full resource id of a vnet subnet, such as '/subscriptions/subid/resourceGroups/rg1/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/test-vnet/subnets/subnet1'.

state.description: Gets the state of virtual network rule.

ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint.description: Ignore missing vnet service endpoint or not.

items.description: A rule governing the accessibility from a specific virtual network.

virtualNetworkRules.description: The list of virtual network rules.

encryption.description: The encryption properties for this resource.

keyName.description: Name of the Key from KeyVault

keyVersion.description: Version of the Key from KeyVault

keySource.description: Enumerates the possible value of keySource for Encryption

200.description:
The resource provider should return 200 (OK) to indicate that the operation completed successfully. For other errors (e.g. internal errors) use the appropriate HTTP error code.
The nextLink field is expected to point to the URL the client should use to fetch the next page (per server side paging). This matches the OData guidelines for paged responses here. If a resource provider does not support paging, it should return the same body (JSON object with "value" property) but omit nextLink entirely (or set to null, *not* empty string) for future compatibility.
The nextLink should be implemented using following query parameters:
· skipToken: opaque token that allows the resource provider to skip resources already enumerated. This value is defined and returned by the RP after first request via nextLink.
· top: the optional client query parameter which defines the maximum number of records to be returned by the server.
Implementation details:
· NextLink may include all the query parameters (specifically OData $filter) used by the client in the first query. 
· Server may return less records than requested with nextLink. Returning zero records with NextLink is an acceptable response. 
Clients must fetch records until the nextLink is not returned back / null. Clients should never rely on number of returned records to determinate if pagination is completed.

200.description:
The resource provider should return 200 (OK) to indicate that the operation completed successfully. For other errors (e.g. internal errors) use the appropriate HTTP error code.
The nextLink field is expected to point to the URL the client should use to fetch the next page (per server side paging). This matches the OData guidelines for paged responses. If a resource provider does not support paging, it should return the same body but leave nextLink empty for future compatibility.
For a detailed explanation of each field in the response body, please refer to the request body description in the PUT resource section.

nextLink.description: The link used to get the next page of accounts.

items.description: Cognitive Services account is an Azure resource representing the provisioned account, it's type, location and SKU.

kind.description: The Kind of the resource.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

type.description: The identity type.

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

userAssignedIdentities.description: The list of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}

principalId.description: Azure Active Directory principal ID associated with this Identity.

clientId.description: Client App Id associated with this identity.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the cognitive services account at the time the operation was called.

internalId.description: The internal identifier (deprecated, do not use this property).

value.description: The value of the SkuCapability.

items.description: SkuCapability indicates the capability of a certain feature.

capabilities.description: Gets the capabilities of the cognitive services account. Each item indicates the capability of a specific feature. The values are read-only and for reference only.

isMigrated.description: If the resource is migrated from an existing key.

countOfUpgradesAfterDowngrades.description: Gets the count of upgrades after downgrades.

customSubDomainName.description: Optional subdomain name used for token-based authentication.

networkAcls.description: A collection of rules governing the accessibility from specific network locations.

defaultAction.description: The default action when no rule from ipRules and from virtualNetworkRules match. This is only used after the bypass property has been evaluated.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

parameters.description: The ID of the target subscription.

nextLink.description: The link used to get the next page of quota tiers.

items.description: The quota tier information for the subscription

currentTierName.description: Name of the current quota tier for the subscription.

tierUpgradePolicy.description: Gets the tier upgrade policy for the subscription.

assignmentDate.description: The date on which the current tier was assigned to the subscription (UTC).

tierUpgradeEligibilityInfo.description: Information about the quota tier upgrade eligibility for the subscription.

nextTierName.description: Name of the next quota tier for the subscription.

upgradeAvailabilityStatus.description: Specifies whether an upgrade to the next quota tier is available.

upgradeApplicableDate.description: The date after which the current tier will be upgraded to the next tier if the TierUpgradePolicy is "OnceUpgradeIsAvailable" (UTC).

upgradeUnavailabilityReason.description: Reason in case the subscription is not eligible for upgrade to the next tier.

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

value.description: Gets the list of Cognitive Services accounts Deployment and their properties.

DeploymentListResult.description: The list of cognitive services accounts operation response.

sku.description: The resource model definition representing SKU

name.description: The name of the SKU. Ex - P3. It is typically a letter+number code

tier.description: This field is required to be implemented by the Resource Provider if the service has more than one tier, but is not required on a PUT.

size.description: The SKU size. When the name field is the combination of tier and some other value, this would be the standalone code.

family.description: If the service has different generations of hardware, for the same SKU, then that can be captured here.

capacity.description: If the SKU supports scale out/in then the capacity integer should be included. If scale out/in is not possible for the resource this may be omitted.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.description: Properties of Cognitive Services account deployment.

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the resource at the time the operation was called.

version.description: Optional. Deployment model version. If version is not specified, a default version will be assigned. The default version is different for different models and might change when there is new version available for a model. Default version for a model could be found from list models API.

source.description: Optional. Deployment model source ARM resource ID.

sourceAccount.description: Optional. Source of the model, another Microsoft.CognitiveServices accounts ARM resource ID.

count.description: The count value of Call Rate Limit.

renewalPeriod.description: The renewal period in seconds of Call Rate Limit.

callRateLimit.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

model.description: Properties of Cognitive Services account deployment model.

capacity.description: Deployment capacity.

activeCapacity.description: Deployment active capacity. This value might be different from `capacity` if customer recently updated `capacity`.

scaleSettings.description: Properties of Cognitive Services account deployment model. (Deprecated, please use Deployment.sku instead.)

count.description: The count value of Call Rate Limit.

renewalPeriod.description: The renewal period in seconds of Call Rate Limit.

callRateLimit.description: The call rate limit Cognitive Services account.

dynamicThrottlingEnabled.description: If the dynamic throttling is enabled.

priority.description: The priority of this capacity setting.

spilloverDeploymentName.description: Specifies the deployment name that should serve requests when the request would have otherwise been throttled due to reaching current deployment throughput limit.

values.name: Stable
values.description: Legacy state. Replaced with GenerallyAvailable going forward.

values.name: Preview
values.description: Model is in preview and may be subject to changes.

values.name: GenerallyAvailable
values.description: Model is generally available for production use.

values.name: Deprecating
values.description: Model is being deprecated and will be removed in the future. Only customers with existing deployments can create new deployments with this model.

values.name: Deprecated
values.description: Model has been deprecated, also known as retired, and is no longer supported. Inference calls to deployments of models in this lifecycle state will return 410 errors.

values.name: Legacy
values.description: Model is a legacy version that is no longer recommended for use. Customers should migrate to newer models. Check replacementConfig for upgrade information.

ApiKeyAuthConnectionProperties.description:
This connection type covers the generic ApiKey auth connection categories, for examples:
AzureOpenAI:
    Category:= AzureOpenAI
    AuthType:= ApiKey (as type discriminator)
    Credentials:= {ApiKey} as .ApiKey
    Target:= {ApiBase}
            
CognitiveService:
    Category:= CognitiveService
    AuthType:= ApiKey (as type discriminator)
    Credentials:= {SubscriptionKey} as ApiKey
    Target:= ServiceRegion={serviceRegion}
            
CognitiveSearch:
    Category:= CognitiveSearch
    AuthType:= ApiKey (as type discriminator)
    Credentials:= {Key} as ApiKey
    Target:= {Endpoint}
            
Use Metadata property bag for ApiType, ApiVersion, Kind and other metadata fields

credentials.description:
ClientId and ClientSecret are required. Other properties are optional
depending on each OAuth2 provider's implementation.

clientId.description: Client id in the format of UUID

refreshToken.description:
Required by GoogleBigQuery, GoogleAdWords, Hubspot, QuickBooks, Square, Xero, Zoho
where user needs to get RefreshToken offline

tenantId.description: Required by QuickBooks and Xero connection categories

username.description:
Concur, ServiceNow auth server AccessToken grant type is 'Password'
which requires UsernamePassword

tierUpgradePolicy.description: Gets the tier upgrade policy for the subscription.

assignmentDate.description: The date on which the current tier was assigned to the subscription (UTC).

tierUpgradeEligibilityInfo.description: Information about the quota tier upgrade eligibility for the subscription.

nextTierName.description: Name of the next quota tier for the subscription.

upgradeAvailabilityStatus.description: Specifies whether an upgrade to the next quota tier is available.

upgradeApplicableDate.description: The date after which the current tier will be upgraded to the next tier if the TierUpgradePolicy is "OnceUpgradeIsAvailable" (UTC).

upgradeUnavailabilityReason.description: Reason in case the subscription is not eligible for upgrade to the next tier.

allOf.title: Proxy Resource
allOf.description: The resource model definition for a Azure Resource Manager proxy resource. It will not have tags and a location

allOf.title: Resource
allOf.description: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

value.description: Gets the list of Quota Tiers and their properties.

QuotaTierListResult.description: The list of Quota Tiers response.

usageFilterParameter.name: $filter
usageFilterParameter.description: An OData filter expression that describes a subset of usages to return. The supported parameter is name.value (name of the metric, can have an or of multiple names).

raiTopicNameParameter.name: raiTopicName

commitmentPlanResourceNameParameter.description: The name of the commitmentPlan associated with the Cognitive Services Account
